top_signals.title: The False Promise of U.S.-China Stability
top_signals.summary: Washington will come to regret its stalemate with Beijing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fassmer Places Order for Eight Henriksen Slipway Systems
top_signals.summary: Fassmer of Germany has placed an order for eight of the new Henriksen Slipway Systems (HSS) for the automatic launch and recovery of small boats and unmanned surface drones from larger vessels. The eight systems will be installed aboard four…
